import React from "react"; import "react-datepicker/dist/react-datepicker.css"; function OfficeForm({office, setOffice, errors, states, district, officelevels, reportingoffice, selectedOfficeLevel, setSelectedOfficeLevel, selectedReportingOffice, setSelectedReportingOffice, selectedState, setSelectedState, selectedDistrict, loadDistrict, loadReportingOffice, handleSaveConfirmation, handleReset,}) { const updateSelected = (field, value) => { setSelectedValues((prev) => ({ ...prev, [field]: value, })); }; return (
Add New Office
1. General Details
setOffice({ ...office, office_name: e.target.value }) } />
{errors.office_name}
setOffice({ ...office, office_name_local: e.target.value }) } />
{errors.office_level_id}
{errors.reporting_office_id}
2. Contact Details
setOffice({ ...office, address: e.target.value }) } />
{errors.state_id}
{errors.district_id}
{ const value = e.target.value.replace(/\D/g, "").slice(0, 15); setOffice({ ...office, mobile: value }) }} />
{errors.mobile}
setOffice({ ...office, email: e.target.value }) } />
{errors.email}
3. Nodal Officer Details
setOffice({ ...office, nodel_name: e.target.value }) } />
{ const value = e.target.value.replace(/\D/g, "").slice(0, 10); setOffice({ ...office, nodel_mobile:value }) }} />
{errors.nodel_mobile}
setOffice({ ...office, nodel_email: e.target.value }) } />
{errors.nodel_email}
  
); } export default OfficeForm;
